segments.text: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: all the earth: Heb. all the earth
heading: A Psalm of Praise

segments.text: Serve the LORD with gladness! Come into his presence with singing!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Know that the LORD, he is God! It is he who made us, and we are his; we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: and not we ourselves: or, and his we are

segments.text: Enter his gates with thanksgiving, and his courts with praise! Give thanks to him; bless his name!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the LORD is good; his steadfast love endures forever, and his faithfulness to all generations.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: to all generations: Heb. to generation and generation
